name: Zhejiang Taitan Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Taitan Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of textile machines in China. It offers spinning, weaving, twisting, and dyeing machinery, as well as textile equipment. The company also exports its products internationally. Zhejiang Taitan Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in Xinchang, China.
